Package org.vorpal.blade.services.keepalive

Class Summary
KeepAliveCallflow  
KeepAliveConfig  
KeepAliveExpiry  
KeepAliveReinvite This class manages keep-alive requests by using re-INVITEs.
KeepAliveServlet  
KeepAliveUpdate This class manages keep-alive requests by using UPDATEs.
